combined_text: decorum "decorum Also found in: Thesaurus, Legal, Idioms, Wikipedia .de·co·rum (dĭ-kôr′əm)n.1. Appropriateness of behavior or conduct; propriety: ""In the Ireland of the 1940's ... thestolidity of a long, empty, grave face was thought to be the height of decorum and profundity"" (John Mc Gahern).2. decorums
